title: Ultra-Detailed Hyper-Realistic Beauty Editorial
sourceTitle: Oversized Skincare Beauty Product Editorial Campaign AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-detailed hyper-realistic beauty editorial photograph featuring oversized architectural skincare cream jar as an oversized hero prop. Subject: adult model sitting on the jar lid and leaning one hand against the giant container around oversized architectural skincare cream jar, with elegant fashion styling, refined skin detail, playful luxury campaign presence, and premium packaging design. Scene: Clean white seamless studio background with minimal clutter, subtle realistic shadows beneath the product and model, and high-key beauty advertising atmosphere. Composition: 1:1 square composition with giant product scaled dramatically larger than the person, model sitting on, leaning against, or posing beside the product, and specific campaign mood variant with readable visual details guiding the relationship between model and packaging. Signature Elements: Preserved oversized skincare beauty product editorial campaign source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Polished commercial beauty photography, premium skincare campaign aesthetic, playful luxury scale illusion, photorealistic 8K detail, sharp focus, and refined high-end packaging finish. Color Palette: Clean white seamless background, hero product packaging colors from minimal frosted white jar with silver cap and pale blush label, soft skin tones, elegant fashion styling accents, and restrained luxury highlights. Lighting: Soft diffused high-key lighting, realistic product shadows, refined skin highlights, glossy or matte packaging definition, and clean studio exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
